title: Tick Control in Cedarhurst, Long Island | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Cedarhurst, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Starting at $125. Same-day service available.
intro: Cedarhurst's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to parks make it a wonderful place to live, but these green spaces also create ideal conditions for tick populations. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Cedarhurst, protecting your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our proven treatment methods target ticks at all life stages, ensuring your property remains safe all season long.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Long Island communities like Cedarhurst with specialized tick control solutions tailored to the area's unique landscape. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating tick populations around your home.
localContext: From the stately homes near Cedarhurst Park to properties along the Lawrence border, our team understands the specific tick challenges facing Cedarhurst residents with their well-maintained lawns and mature landscaping. We treat common tick hotspots including property perimeters, woodland edges, and shaded garden areas where these pests thrive in our coastal Long Island climate.

faqs.question: What does tick control service in Cedarhurst include?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of tick treatments to high-risk areas like lawn perimeters, shrubs, and wooded edges, and preventative barrier protection. We focus on areas where ticks commonly harbor, including shaded spots, tall grass, and landscaping near your home. Follow-up treatments are recommended every 4-6 weeks during peak tick season.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Cedarhurst, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Cedarhurst typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active whenever temperatures are above freezing. We recommend starting tick control treatments in early spring and maintaining them throughout the season for optimal protection against deer ticks, dog ticks, and lone star ticks common to Long Island.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Cedarhurst range from $125 to $325 per treatment, depending on your property size and the level of infestation. Most residential properties require treatments every 4-6 weeks during tick season. We offer seasonal packages that provide better value for ongoing protection throughout the spring, summer, and fall months.

faqs.question: Is tick control treatment safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets off treated areas until they're dry, typically 2-3 hours after application. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions and can schedule treatments at times convenient for your family's routine.
